transcript: The man opens the wardrobe with the key. He bends down and goes in. Inside the wardrobe, time moves fast. When he comes out again, five minutes had passed. But no time had passed in the outside world. The man understood instantly. This wardrobe can allow people to steal time. He grabbed his textbook and returned to the wardrobe. There was an important exam in the morning, but he hadn't even started studying for it yet. When he arrived at the exam room, his classmates stared at him strangely. The man's mustache grew long overnight. With this wardrobe this wardrobe he always has more time than others he was a loser and now he graduated with honors and got a decent job of course in the company the man has also shown amazing talent he can do in one night what others can't do in weeks as long as he has this wardrobe he had unlimited time soon the man was promoted and given a raise but the frequent use of the had its consequences. This young man in his 20s started to grow gray hair. But in order to cope with his heavy workload, he had to keep using the wardrobe. The man's performance continued to soar. And his health got worse. The man was promoted to partner in the firm. At the celebration banquet, he finally lost his strength. He collapsed. Through the doctor's surgery, he was able to recover.
